title: Clarification Log Entry
description: A single entry in the clarification log, tracking open questions and decisions that must be resolved before proceeding to gate review.

question.description: The open question or decision that needs resolution

context.description: Background context explaining why this clarification is needed

owner.description: Person or role responsible for resolving this clarification

deadline.description: Date by which this clarification must be resolved (ISO 8601)

impact_if_unresolved.description: Description of impact on scope, timeline, or design if this clarification is not resolved

resolution.description: The answer or resolution to the question
